hooks.command: echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"CPM_FM project rule: BEFORE any work in this repo (searching, editing, planning, or delegating to sub-agents), read AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md first. Any feature or requirement change MUST follow the mandatory 8-step Requirement-change workflow in AGENTS.md (update SRS, implement with Satisfies tags, regenerate views, add Verifies-tagged tests, run pytest, update manual test plan/scorecard, bump version). Present a plan and get approval before implementing.\"}}"
